items.name: sm
items.signature: out property <length> sm:    2px;   // checkboxes, small chips

items.name: md
items.signature: out property <length> md:    4px;   // buttons, inputs, cards

items.name: lg
items.signature: out property <length> lg:    8px;   // panels, dialogs, larger cards

items.name: xl
items.signature: out property <length> xl:   12px;   // navigation pane, large surfaces
